name: recoil_app_pre_translate_message
description: RecoilApp::PreTranslateMessage consumes WM_SYSKEYDOWN through WM_SYSKEYUP only when the video acceleration option is nonzero.
known_limits: The smoke verifies the software-mode pass-through, accelerated system-key range acceptance, and adjacent non-system-key rejection. Binary-safe verification remains pending for the RecoilApp source cluster.
